memory.summary: That scholarship money would really help my term costs, but I'm tempted to just have fun now since nobody else is waiting on me. I need to focus on this alone for a few hours before the deadline.
My energy is dipping and I'm feeling the urge to slack off, but that scholarship money matters more than my temporary comfort. I need to push through this slump before the deadline hits.

desires: Not look like a complete failure to my teammates and cohort after I've been pushing so hard; I need to prove the scholarship money isn't making me useless.
Get this essay done in the next hour before I literally pass out from zero energy, because if I collapse now I'll miss the deadline and lose the funding that keeps us all together.
Feel something other than this crushing numbness right now, even if it's just a quick distraction or a real meal with someone who actually cares about me.

goals.description: Finish the scholarship essay and upload both documents immediately. I need this money to secure my independence, and letting down my cohort by looking unreliable is worse than being tired right now.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) drives me to avoid appearing like a slacker to the hallmate hanging around; I can't risk them thinking I'm wasting time. Even though I'm exhausted and impulsive, the short-term social cost of flaking outweighs the immediate urge to game. Getting this done clears my head so I can actually hang out with the real friends later without guilt.

agent.last_reasoning: I need to crush this essay now before my cohort sees me slacking. The money secures my future, but more importantly, I can't let them think I'm unreliable. Ignoring the urge to game is the only way to keep my trust high with the group.

goals.description: Finish the scholarship essay and upload the two documents immediately. I need this money to stop stressing about term costs, and it's my own thing—no one can make me wait.
goals.rationale: My value priority for 'relationships' (0.5) means I want to avoid letting down my close friend group by flaking on shared plans or looking unreliable later. The scholarship is the only way to secure my stability without borrowing from them. Even though I'm impulsive and tempted to game, skipping this now creates a future consequence I'll have to deal with alone, which feels isolating.

goals.description: Go live on the game stream for exactly 45 minutes as a reward after submitting the application.
goals.rationale: I hate waiting and the urge to play right now is strong (impulsive trait). But if I start playing before the app is done, I'll probably procrastinate until Wednesday, risking my reputation. Deferring it satisfies my need for immediate fun without derailing the task that matters most to my social standing.

desires: Get this scholarship money so I don't have to stress about term costs anymore.
